---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="visuals-intro">
  <p>Where climate science meets <del>Adobe Illustrator</del> visual storytelling.</p>
</div>

<div class="art-list">

  <div class="art-item">
    <img src="images/art/inconvenientdata.jpeg" alt="An Inconvenient Data" class="art-img"/>
    <div class="art-text">
      <p class="art-title">an inconvenient data</p>
      <p class="art-desc">A visual homage to Al Gore's iconic film — real climate data reframed as a movie poster. Because sometimes science needs a cinematic push.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="art-item">
    <img src="images/art/movie-temps.jpeg" alt="Movie Temps" class="art-img"/>
    <div class="art-text">
      <p class="art-title">climate data, cinematic cut</p>
      <p class="art-desc">Temperature anomalies reimagined through the colour palettes of classic films. Data as set design.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="art-item">
    <img src="images/art/cassette.jpeg" alt="Good Quality Air" class="art-img"/>
    <div class="art-text">
      <p class="art-title">good quality air? as retro as cassettes</p>
      <p class="art-desc">Air quality trends presented as a cassette tape — a reminder that clean air is becoming as rare as physical media.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="art-item">
    <img src="images/art/reminder.jpeg" alt="There is no Planet B" class="art-img"/>
    <div class="art-text">
      <p class="art-title">there is no planet b</p>
      <p class="art-desc">A simple statement. No annotation needed. The data speaks, the design amplifies.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
.visuals-intro {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 2rem 0 2.5rem 0;
  color: #555;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
}

.art-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 3.5rem;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1rem 4rem 1rem;
}

.art-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
}

.art-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.art-text {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 1rem 0.2rem 0 0.2rem;
}

.art-title {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #aaa;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
}

.art-desc {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #555;
  line-height: 1.65;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 0;
}
</style>
```
